---
title: "Rainfall manuscript figures"
author: "Megan Sears"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = F,
  message = F, 
  warning  = F)

# load packages
library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggExtra)
library(viridis)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(ggpubr)
library(hydroGOF)

```

# TB vs pixel

```{r}

comp_all <- read_csv('./data/final/mrms/pixel_compare/compare/comp_cpf_etf2.csv')

# Create RQI buckets
comp_all <- comp_all %>%
  mutate(rqi_bucket = cut(rqi, 
                          breaks = c(0, .20, .40, .60, .80, 1),
                          labels = c("0-0.2", "0.2-0.4", "0.4-0.6", "0.6-0.8", "0.8-1.0"), 
                          include.lowest = TRUE))

color_palette <- c(
  "0-0.2" = "#66A61E",
  "0.2-0.4" = "#1B9E77",
  "0.4-0.6" = "#D95F02",
  "0.6-0.8" = "#7570B3",
  "0.8-1.0" = "#E7298A"
)

new_facet_titles <- c(
  "CPF" = "East",
  "ETF" = "West"
)

# MI60 correlation to figure
spearman_corrs_mi60 <- comp_all %>%
  group_by(fire) %>%
  summarize(spearman_corr = cor(MI60_mmhr.y, 
                                MI60_mmhr.x, 
                                method = "spearman"))

# Event sum correlation for figure
spearman_corrs_eventsum <- comp_all %>%
  group_by(fire) %>%
  summarize(spearman_corr = cor(event_sum_mm.y, 
                                event_sum_mm.x, 
                                method = "spearman"))
# West rmse MI60
et_rmse_mi60 <- comp_all %>%
  filter(fire == 'ETF') %>% 
  summarize(rmse = rmse(MI60_mmhr.x,
                        MI60_mmhr.y)) %>%
  mutate(R_spearman = 0.49) # previously calculated in stat_cor

# West rmse event sum
et_rmse_sum <- comp_all %>%
  filter(fire == 'ETF') %>% 
  summarize(rmse = rmse(event_sum_mm.x,
                        event_sum_mm.y)) %>%
  mutate(R_spearman = 0.58) # previously calculated in stat_cor

###############################################################################

# East Troublesome - WEST sites - MI60
et60 <- comp_all %>%
  filter(fire == 'ETF') %>% 
  arrange(desc(rqi)) %>%
  ggplot(., 
         aes(y = MI60_mmhr.y, 
             x = MI60_mmhr.x, 
             color = rqi_bucket)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, 
             size = 4, 
             stroke = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_palette) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, 
              slope = 1, 
              linetype = "dashed", 
              color = "black") +
  labs(x = 'MRMS MI60 (mm/hr)', 
       y = 'TB MI60 (mm/hr)', 
       color = 'RQI') +
  theme_bw(base_size = 18) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    legend.position = 'none',
    legend.justification = c(0, 1.1), 
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
    annotate("text", 
             x = 15, 
             y = 32, 
             label = "R = 0.49, RMSE = 3.6", 
          color = "black", 
          size = 4)

et60

et_marg60 <- ggMarginal(et60,
           groupColour = T,
           groupFill = T)

et_marg60

ggsave('./figures/rainfallFigureUpdates/pixel_tb_ETmarg_mi60.png',
       plot = et_marg,
       width = 7,
       height = 5,
       dpi=600)

# East Troublesome - WEST sites - MI60
etEvent <- comp_all %>%
  filter(fire == 'ETF') %>% 
  arrange(desc(rqi)) %>%
  ggplot(., 
         aes(y = event_sum_mm.y, 
             x = event_sum_mm.x, 
             color = rqi_bucket)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6, 
             size = 4, 
             stroke = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(values = color_palette) +
  geom_abline(intercept = 0, 
              slope = 1, 
              linetype = "dashed", 
              color = "black") +
  labs(x = 'MRMS event rainfall (mm)', 
       y = 'TB event rainfall (mm)', 
       color = 'RQI') +
  theme_bw(base_size = 18) +
  theme(
    panel.grid = element_blank(),
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "white"),
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    text = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.title = element_text(color = "black"),
    axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
    legend.position = 'none',
    legend.justification = c(0, 1.1), 
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 16)) +
    annotate("text", 
             x = 15, 
             y = 32, 
             label = "R = 0.58, RMSE = 4.7", 
          color = "black", 
          size = 4)

etEvent

et_margEvent <- ggMarginal(etEvent,
           groupColour = T,
           groupFill = T)

et_margEvent

ggsave('./figures/rainfallFigureUpdates/pixel_tb_ETmarg_eventSum.png',
       plot = et_marg,
       width = 7,
       height = 5,
       dpi=600)

###############################################################################

# East side



```
